section_name: Liability of County Tax Assessor-collector for Certain Acts of Deputies
text: Notwithstanding any other law, a county tax assessor-collector may not be held liable for an offense or damages arising from the misuse of license plates or other fraudulent activity related to vehicle registration and titling by an individual or business entity deputized by the county tax assessor-collector to perform titling services in accordance with rules adopted under Section 520.0071 (Deputies) (a).
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 520. Misc. Provisions
##### § 520.0072 — Liability of County Tax Assessor-collector for Certain Acts of Deputies

Notwithstanding any other law, a county tax assessor-collector may not be held liable for an offense or damages arising from the misuse of license plates or other fraudulent activity related to vehicle registration and titling by an individual or business entity deputized by the county tax assessor-collector to perform titling services in accordance with rules adopted under Section 520.0071 (Deputies) (a).

*Added by Acts 2023, 88th Leg., R.S., Ch. 541 (H.B.3860), Sec. 1, eff. September 1, 2023.*

subsections.text: Notwithstanding any other law, a county tax assessor-collector may not be held liable for an offense or damages arising from the misuse of license plates or other fraudulent activity related to vehicle registration and titling by an individual or business entity deputized by the county tax assessor-collector to perform titling services in accordance with rules adopted under Section 520.0071 (Deputies) (a).
